title: chionanthus broomeanus var. cyanocarpus
intro: Chionanthus broomeanus var. cyanocarpus, also known as the Chinese frigid tree or the blue-fruited frigid tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Chionanthus broomeanus var. cyanocarpus include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
